/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.2.0 -o libpiper_phonemize.1.2.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libpiper_phonemize.1.dylib CMakeFiles/piper_phonemize.dir/src/phonemize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper_phonemize.dir/src/phoneme_ids.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper_phonemize.dir/src/tashkeel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper_phonemize.dir/src/shared.cpp.o   -L/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/p/src/piper_phonemize_external-build/ei/lib  -L/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/p/src/piper_phonemize_external/lib/onnxruntime-osx-arm64-1.14.1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/p/src/piper_phonemize_external-build/ei/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/p/src/piper_phonemize_external/lib/onnxruntime-osx-arm64-1.14.1/lib -lespeak-ng -lonnxruntime
